lines.text: Once awarded, you can see exactly which suppliers won, listed right here.
And this is the flat fair price per unit that every awarded supplier agreed to.
Each awarded supplier signs their own agreement for their share of your demand.
Then they upload their fleet documents, which you can track in the documents panel.
A Nguzo field inspector then physically verifies the machine on site, and you watch it advance in the activity log.
That inspection is your protection, you're never paying for a machine nobody has seen.
Splitting your demand across several suppliers also protects you, if one falls short, the others still carry the job.
When the field inspection clears, the next action is yours, the permits.
